title: AntiXrayOP
description: High-performance anti-xray for Paper: obfuscation, fake ores, recent history, and auto-escalation.
body:
![Anti Xray OP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf9ee5afe1027b0caa7cd85846dbbde52ef1c9b6.jpeg)
### AntiXrayOP is a high-performance Paper anti-xray plugin focused on stopping xray abuse before it becomes a server problem.

It combines per-player ore obfuscation, fake-ore camouflage, behavior-based scoring, and staff-friendly tooling in one lightweight package.

## New in 1.4.0
- Rebuilt the GUI into a cleaner dashboard with dedicated protection, detection, and material-list screens
- Added quick in-game actions for reload, protected-view refresh, and clearing live detection memory
- Fixed GUI edits on older configs so missing keys no longer fall back to broken raw values
- Reduced false positives by scoring only inside the configured detection Y-range
- Player-placed tracked ores now stay visible during runtime and no longer poison suspicion scoring
- Tightened update-check permission handling and improved the local Modrinth release flow

## Core Features
- Per-player underground ore obfuscation in loaded chunks
- Real-time refresh after mining, placement, explosions, and movement
- Fake-ore camouflage to waste xray users' time
- Suspicion scoring based on ore ratio, concealed ore hits, and rapid ore chains
- Runtime protection for player-placed ore displays by avoiding live re-hide/re-score of tracked placed ores
- Staff alerts with cooldown protection against spam
- Recent mining history for fast staff review
- Optional auto-escalation commands for repeat offenders

## In-Game GUI
Use `/antixrayop` to manage the plugin without leaving the server:
- Toggle strict-hide-all, camouflage, detection, auto-escalation, and OP bypass
- Tune scan/prune behavior, obfuscation height, decoy settings, alert windows, ratios, bonuses, and escalation thresholds
- Run quick reload / refresh / clear-memory actions directly from the dashboard
- Edit hidden ores, fake ore decoys, and valid base blocks in separate list editors

## Commands
- `/antixray status [player]`
- `/antixray recent [player] [limit]`
- `/antixray top [limit]`
- `/antixray reload`
- `/antixray clear <player|all>`
- `/antixray toggle <player>`
- `/antixray refresh <player|all>`
- `/antixrayop`

## Permissions
- `antixrayop.admin`
- `antixrayop.gui`
- `antixrayop.alert`
- `antixrayop.bypass`

## Preview
![AntiXrayOP Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/49CeslFb/images/fe883d0012e2cab372a11024af65a07b36505e56_350.webp)

## Compatibility
- Java 21 build target
- Paper / Purpur / Folia / Spigot / Bukkit loaders listed on this page
- Minecraft 1.20+ server support listed in versions
